footer.description: TML is a digital identity attestation middleware for public infrastructure accountability in Morocco and Africa. Cryptographic proof at every step.

hero.title: Trust Every Dirham of Public Spending
hero.subtitle: Cryptographic accountability for public infrastructure. Every milestone verified, every payment justified.

contractor.title: Contractor Declares
contractor.description: The contractor submits a milestone completion declaration with supporting documentation and evidence.

auditor.title: Auditor Verifies
auditor.description: A licensed auditor reviews documentation and an inspector conducts on-site geofenced verification.

citizen.title: Citizens Attest
citizen.description: Registered citizens within the project zone provide community attestation to reach quorum.

cta.title: Verify a Payment Clearance Certificate
cta.subtitle: Enter the SHA-256 hash to verify the authenticity and integrity of any certificate.
cta.helpText: Enter the SHA-256 hash found on your Payment Clearance Certificate to verify its authenticity.

security.title: Cryptographic Trust Infrastructure
security.subtitle: Every certificate is anchored in verifiable cryptography, not institutional trust alone.

ed25519.title: Ed25519 Signatures
ed25519.description: Every attestation is cryptographically signed with Ed25519, ensuring tamper-proof verification of milestone completion across the entire disbursement chain.

cnie.title: CNIE Identity Binding
cnie.description: National electronic ID cards are bound to decentralized identifiers, anchoring every action to a verified real-world identity.

multiParty.title: Multi-Party Attestation
multiParty.description: Inspector, auditor, and citizen quorum must independently attest before any funds are released, eliminating single points of compromise.

about.title: About TML
about.description: TML (Transparency Middleware Layer) is a digital identity attestation platform for public infrastructure accountability in Morocco and Africa. It connects contractors, inspectors, auditors, and citizens through CNIE-verified digital identities.
about.mission: Our mission is to ensure that every dirham of public funds is spent transparently by requiring verifiable multi-party attestations before any disbursement through the General Treasury of the Kingdom.

verify.title: Verify Certificate
verify.subtitle: Independently verify the authenticity and integrity of any Payment Clearance Certificate issued by TML.

notFound.title: Certificate Not Found
notFound.description: No certificate matching this hash was found. Please verify the hash and try again.
notFound.hint: Double-check that you entered the complete 64-character SHA-256 hash.

invalid.title: Verification Failed
invalid.description: The certificate could not be verified. It may have been tampered with.

scanner.title: Camera Scanner
scanner.description: Point your camera at the QR code on the certificate

hashMode.title: Hash Verification
hashMode.description: Type or paste the SHA-256 integrity hash printed on the certificate
hashMode.helpText: The SHA-256 hash is printed at the bottom of every Payment Clearance Certificate.

vpMode.title: Verifiable Presentation (OpenID4VP)
vpMode.description: Submit a W3C Verifiable Presentation token for cryptographic verification
vpMode.howItWorksText: The VP token is cryptographically verified against the issuer's DID using Ed25519 signature validation.

certificate.title: Payment Clearance Certificate
certificate.verifiedDescription: This Payment Clearance Certificate is authentic and has not been tampered with.
certificate.revokedDescription: This certificate has been revoked and is no longer valid for fund disbursement.

scanQr.title: Scan QR Code
scanQr.description: Scan the QR code printed on the certificate

enterHash.title: Enter Hash
enterHash.description: Type or paste the SHA-256 integrity hash

errors.qrFailed: Failed to read QR code. Please try again.
errors.credentialFailed: Failed to verify credential. Please check the token and try again.
